text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A very tired-looking Vodka comes walking
toward me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What was up with that dream last night?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I was so excited to be surrounded by all those
stuffed animals...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Do I subconsciously wish I had a cute room like
that?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was not a fun way to wake up. I feel exhausted...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Can we go light on the training today?
